Places of the Willverse, from Sacred Valley to the void between worlds. Seeded from the books; grows with community edits.

; Locations by series
* [[:Category:Traveler's Gate locations|Locations of Traveler's Gate]]
* [[:Category:Elder Empire locations|Locations of Elder Empire]]
* [[:Category:Cradle locations|Locations of Cradle]]
* [[:Category:The Last Horizon locations|Locations of The Last Horizon]]

; Locations by kind
* [[:Category:Settlements|Settlements]]
* [[:Category:Nations and empires|Nations and empires]]
* [[:Category:Structures|Structures]]
* [[:Category:Regions|Regions]]
* [[:Category:Otherworldly locations|Otherworldly locations]]

[[Category:Content]]
